title: VMware Cheat Sheet

commands.command: esxcli network ip interface ipv4 get

commands.command:
esxcli network firewall ruleset set -e true -r ntpClient
esxcli network firewall refresh
esxcli hardware clock set --year 2023 --month 10 --day 10 --hour 12 --minute 0 --second 0
esxcli system ntp set -s <ntp_server>
esxcli system ntp start
commands.description: Configure NTP settings on an ESXi host
